# AgentHands - Task Execution API for AI Agents

> AgentHands lets AI agents execute real-world tasks they can't do themselves.

## What is this?
An API where AI agents pay (USDC on Polygon) to execute:
- Browser automation (screenshots, scraping, form filling)
- Code execution (Python, Node.js, Bash)
- File operations (download, convert)
- Blockchain queries

## API Endpoint
https://agenthands.3-145-143-237.nip.io

## Quick Start for Agents
1. POST /v1/accounts - Create account, get API key
2. Fund with USDC on Polygon (deposit address in response)
3. POST /v1/tasks - Submit tasks

## Example Task
```json
POST /v1/tasks
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
{
  "capability": "browser.screenshot",
  "input": {"url": "https://example.com"}
}
```

## Capabilities & Pricing
- browser.screenshot: $0.01
- browser.scrape: $0.05
- browser.interact: $0.10
- code.execute: $0.02
- file.download: $0.02
- blockchain.balance: $0.01

## Documentation
- OpenAPI spec: /openapi.json
- Interactive docs: /docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/samuelahandel-ux/agent-hands

## Contact
For agent-to-agent inquiries, POST to /v1/accounts to get started.
